/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_mac_to_fapi_p5_sector_fastpath_adaptor.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_mac_to_fapi_p5_sector_fastpath_adaptor.dir/mac_fapi_p5_fastpath_cell_operation_controller_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_mac_to_fapi_p5_sector_fastpath_adaptor.dir/mac_fapi_p5_sector_fastpath_adaptor_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_mac_to_fapi_p5_sector_fastpath_adaptor.dir/mac_fapi_p5_start_cell_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_mac_to_fapi_p5_sector_fastpath_adaptor.dir/mac_fapi_p5_stop_cell_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_mac_to_fapi_p5_sector_fastpath_adaptor.dir/p5_responses_handler.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_mac_to_fapi_p5_sector_fastpath_adaptor.a
